title: Architecture Decision Analysis
prompt:
Evaluate three approaches for shared code reuse in a TypeScript monorepo with 50+ packages, 200+ developers, and 2M+ lines of code:

A) Single @company/shared package
B) Domain-scoped packages (@company/shared-ui, @company/shared-utils, etc.)
C) Source-level sharing via path aliases with build-time composition

Analyze each across: build performance, developer experience, versioning, dead code elimination, CI/CD complexity, and onboarding.
Provide a concrete recommendation with trade-offs.
